function.name: get_resume
function.description: Read the full resume/portfolio data: profile, skills, experience, projects, education, certificates, and behavioral stories. Call this first before answering factual questions about the person.

function.name: update_skills
function.description: Replace the entire skills/tech section of the resume. Read existing skills with get_resume before modifying so you don't accidentally drop entries.

skills.description: Complete list of skills to set on the resume

function.name: update_profile_field
function.description: Update a single text field in the profile section of the resume.

function.name: save_cover_letter
function.description: Save a fully written cover letter to the database. It will be publicly accessible at /<hash>/cover. Only call this once the full letter is written.

content.description: The complete cover letter text (plain text, no markdown).
